mapper.select: SELECT * FROM innovation_team_application ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM innovation_team_application WHERE applicant_id = #{applicantId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM innovation_team_application WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO innovation_team_application ( team_name, cooperative_enterprise, applicant_student_id, applicant_name, applicant_contact, on_campus_mentor_name, on_campus_mentor_contact, enterprise_mentor_name, enterprise_mentor_contact, innovation_direction, positioning_and_ideas, applicant_signature, applicant_sign_date, on_campus_mentor_signature, on_campus_mentor_sign_date, enterprise_mentor_signature, enterprise_mentor_sign_date, status, applicant_id, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{teamName}, #{cooperativeEnterprise}, #{applicantStudentId}, #{applicantName}, #{applicantContact}, #{onCampusMentorName}, #{onCampusMentorContact}, #{enterpriseMentorName}, #{enterpriseMentorContact}, #{innovationDirection}, #{positioningAndIdeas}, #{applicantSignature}, #{applicantSignDate}, #{onCampusMentorSignature}, #{onCampusMentorSignDate}, #{enterpriseMentorSignature}, #{enterpriseMentorSignDate}, #{status}, #{applicantId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE innovation_team_application SET team_name = #{teamName}, cooperative_enterprise = #{cooperativeEnterprise}, applicant_student_id = #{applicantStudentId}, applicant_name = #{applicantName}, applicant_contact = #{applicantContact}, on_campus_mentor_name = #{onCampusMentorName}, on_campus_mentor_contact = #{onCampusMentorContact}, enterprise_mentor_name = #{enterpriseMentorName}, enterprise_mentor_contact = #{enterpriseMentorContact}, innovation_direction = #{innovationDirection}, positioning_and_ideas = #{positioningAndIdeas}, applicant_signature = #{applicantSignature}, applicant_sign_date = #{applicantSignDate}, on_campus_mentor_signature = #{onCampusMentorSignature}, on_campus_mentor_sign_date = #{onCampusMentorSignDate}, enterprise_mentor_signature = #{enterpriseMentorSignature}, enterprise_mentor_sign_date = #{enterpriseMentorSignDate}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
